message:
fix: prevent SectionShell content from vanishing on page load

Replaced manual IntersectionObserver + animate pattern with Framer
Motion's whileInView + viewport={{ once: true }} for section reveal
animations. The previous approach started sections at opacity:0 and
relied on an IntersectionObserver callback to flip a state variable,
but the observer couldn't fire until after the page transition
completed — creating a race condition where all sections were invisible
on initial load and only appeared after scrolling.

whileInView handles viewport detection internally and works correctly
with AnimatePresence page transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
